name: oh-my-claudeagent
description: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Specialist agents handle planning, execution, code review, debugging, and research with evidence-based verification.

enableKeywordTriggers.title: Enable keyword triggers
enableKeywordTriggers.description: Optional compatibility setting for legacy keyword-trigger workflows (default: false).

statuslineMode.title: Statusline mode
statuslineMode.description: Preferred OMCA statusline mode: off, direct, or daemon (default: direct).
